title: Prohibit Studio Rpc Eventhub Lifecycle Leaks
forbids: daemon-owned EventHub lifecycle, EventHub exposure through host context or handler calls, and replacement of the package runtime's live EventHub layer with an injected instance
why: The app daemon mounts Studio RPC, while the studio-server runtime owns one scoped EventHub service for procedures, workers, replay, and disposal.
remediate: Keep EventHub construction and shutdown inside the studio-server runtime layer; hosts supply leaf ports, not an EventHub instance.
message: Studio RPC daemon leaked EventHub lifecycle ownership.
